question: HIPAA contains these 'five' parts:
canonical_answer: Title I, Health Insurance Access, Portability, and Renewability, Title II, Preventing Healthcare Fraud & Abuse, Administrative Simplification, & Medical Liability Reform, Title III, Tax-Related Health Provisions, Title IV, Application and Enforcement of Group Health Insurance Requirments, and Title V, Revenue Offsets.
